name: Basic Spaetzle Dough Recipe
recipeInstructions:
(Adapted from Art Culinaire issue #39)
1. Bring a saucepan of salted water to a boil.
2. Reduce the heat and maintain a simmer.
3. In a bowl, stir together all the ingredients.
4. Place a colander over the pan.
5. Pour about 1/4 of the batter into the colander and press through the holes with a plastic spatula into the hot water.
6. When the spaetzle starts to float to the surface, cover the pan.
7. Keep covered until the spaetzle appears to swell and is fluffy.
8. Remove the dumplings and repeat the procedure with the remaining batter.
Yield: 4 servings
Categories: Emeril, Dumplings
